request.description: Legacy completeness endpoint. Backward compatible summary (`missing_yellow`, `yellow_ready`). For legal, must not include personal-only requirements.
Client profile view. For legal client verify: completeness.type=legal, missing_contract, contract_ready and files map with corporate categories.

exec: const company = data?.legal_profile?.company_name || data?.name; if (company) pm.environment.set('legalCompanyName', company);
const bin = data?.legal_profile?.bin || data?.bin_iin; if (bin) pm.environment.set('legalBin', bin);

body.raw:
{
  "client_type": "legal",
  "name": "{{legalCompanyName}}",
  "bin_iin": "{{legalBin}}",
  "phone": "{{contactPersonPhone}}",
  "email": "{{contactPersonEmail}}",
  "address": "{{legalAddress}}",
  "actual_address": "{{legalAddress}}",
  "registration_address": "{{legalAddress}}",
  "contact_info": "Main contact: {{contactPersonName}}, WhatsApp {{contactPersonPhone}}, working hours 09:00-18:00",
  "legal_profile": {
    "company_name": "{{legalCompanyName}}",
    "bin": "{{legalBin}}",
    "legal_form": "TOO",
    "director_full_name": "{{signerFullName}}",
    "contact_person_name": "{{contactPersonName}}",
    "contact_person_position": "{{signerPosition}}",
    "contact_person_phone": "{{contactPersonPhone}}",
    "contact_person_email": "{{contactPersonEmail}}",
    "legal_address": "{{legalAddress}}",
    "actual_address": "{{legalAddress}}",
    "bank_name": "Kaspi Bank",
    "iban": "KZ689261501234567890",
    "bik": "CASPKZKA",
    "kbe": "17",
    "tax_regime": "general",
    "website": "https://silkroadtravel.kz",
    "industry": "travel",
    "company_size": "11-50",
    "additional_info": "Corporate visa support, outbound tourism, B2B partner network"
  }
}
